programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: (MA) After 19-year-old Chris Green is found beaten to death, his family fears the case will never be solved. Years later, an informant's revelations blow the investigation open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: (MA) The 1964 murder of 9-year-old Marise Chiverella terrifies Hazelton. After years of dead ends, a student working as a genetic genealogist reignites the case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
